use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in SaaS applications requiring multiple visual states
Icon-only buttons for toolbars and navigation bars
Destructive action buttons with semantic warning styling
Ghost and outline buttons for secondary actions in forms and dialogs
Accessible buttons with keyboard navigation and focus management
ai_summary: A reusable React Button component with configurable variants and sizes using Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority. Supports default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants with sm, default, lg, and icon sizes. Implements standard accessibility patterns with focus rings and disabled states.
